name: Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd. provides outdoor products in China. It offers children's outdoor equipment, waterproof walking shoes, jackets, ski caps, windproof and splash proof down jackets, polar camp down jackets, outdoor running T-shirts, running and trekking pants, hiking shoes, windproof ski gloves, snowboard suits, trousers, backpacks, moisture pads, tents, folding table and chair sets, and canvas hammock and outdoor sports shoes. The company was formerly known as Beijing Toread Outdoor Products Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd. in July 2015. Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.
